seoTitle: Whorouly South vs Wickliffe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Whorouly South and Wickliffe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Whorouly South vs Wickliffe: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Whorouly South and Wickliffe.
heading: Whorouly South vs Wickliffe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Whorouly South, Victoria and Wickliffe, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Whorouly South has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wickliffe (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Whorouly South or Wickliffe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Whorouly South has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Wickliffe scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Whorouly South scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Wickliffe scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Whorouly South or Wickliffe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Whorouly South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
